This is a testharness.js-based test.

[FAIL] Property width value 'random(fixed random(1, 2), 10px, 100px)'

  assert_true: 'random(fixed random(-2, -1), 10%, 100%)' is a supported value for translate. expected true got false

  assert_false: expected false got true
